title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 13
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Ben. I'm calling about tomorrow's dentist appointment. I told you it was at ten, but that was my mistake. The dentist is seeing another patient then, and the room is not free after twelve. So [1]your appointment is at quarter to eleven[/1]. You don't need to bring your form because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Ben. I'm calling about tomorrow's dentist appointment. I told you it was at ten, but that was my mistake. The dentist is seeing another patient then, and the room is not free after twelve. So your appointment is at quarter to eleven. You don't need to bring your form because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

questions.question: What time should the listener arrive for the dentist appointment?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at quarter to eleven and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at twelve o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at ten o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the appointment is at quarter to eleven.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the airport.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the airport on Friday? || Woman: I was going to take a taxi, but it is much too expensive at that time. || Man: I can ask someone to drive us. || Woman: That's kind, but the train station is closed for repairs. I checked the timetable, and [1]the airport coach leaves from our street[/1]. || Man: Great. Does it leave near your house? || Woman: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

dialogue.text: How are you getting to the airport on Friday?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I was going to take a taxi, but it is much too expensive at that time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can ask someone to drive us.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's kind, but the train station is closed for repairs. I checked the timetable, and the airport coach leaves from our street.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great. Does it leave near your house?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

questions.question: How will they travel to the airport?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, closed railway station platform, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, taxi waiting outside a house, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, coach bus waiting on a street, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The woman says the airport coach leaves from their street.

questions.context: You hear a customer talking to a shop assistant.
questions.audio_script: Assistant: Can I help you with those headphones? || Customer: Yes, I like the large ones, but they are too heavy. My old ones broke last week, so I need new ones today. || Assistant: We also have a cheaper plastic pair. || Customer: I want good sound. I just need something for listening on the bus. || Assistant: In that case, try these. || Customer: Thanks. [1]I'll buy the small wireless headphones[/1], if you have them. || Assistant: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room. || Assistant: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about what to take.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you packed for the picnic? || Woman: Almost. I put in sandals and a thin top because the forecast was warm yesterday. || Man: It changed this morning. The radio said it may get cold while we sit by the lake. || Woman: Really? Then I should change something. || Man: I would. [1]Wear your boots and a warm jumper[/1]. || Woman: Good idea. I don't want to carry an umbrella all day, and the jumper will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

questions.context: You hear two people in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you ordering for breakfast? || Man: I wanted the pancakes, but the kitchen has run out of eggs. || Woman: The fruit bowl looks good. || Man: It does, but I need something hot before my exam. I think [1]I'll order the porridge with honey[/1]. || Woman: Nice choice. I'm having that too. || Man: Great. Could you save us a table near the window while I pay? The café is getting busy, and I don't want to sit outside. It's still cold today. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost phone.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did you find your phone? || Woman: Not yet. I checked the library, because I was sure I had it there after studying. || Man: And what about the school office? You went there afterwards. || Woman: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, a woman from the bakery phoned and said [1]my phone was left on a small table in the bakery[/1]. I'm going to collect it before the place closes. || Man: Good. You looked worried this morning. || Woman: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to the cinema after lunch? || Man: I don't think so. The film we wanted is sold out. || Woman: We could go to the beach instead. || Man: Maybe, but the wind is too strong. There's a new climbing wall near the station, so [1]we can try indoor climbing this afternoon[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the station? || Man: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker. || Man: That should make things easier.
